title: Peppery Russian Ginger Crumble
description: A dense and peppery dish featuring ginger paste and other spices to aid in hangover recovery, suitable for egg-free diets.

ingredients.name: 1 cup whole wheat flour
ingredients.notes: Optional breadcrumbs can be used as a gluten-free alternative.

instructions: Mix the whole wheat flour with the sugar until well combined.
Add in the ground ginger paste and salt, stirring continuously until it forms a dough-like consistency.
Gradually mix in the melted butter while continuing to stir until fully incorporated.
Transfer the mixture onto a greased baking sheet or pie dish. Press down evenly using your fingers or a spatula.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown on top and crisp around the edges.
Allow it to cool slightly before serving as a snack or dessert.
